description:
OL 316 (REV. 2/2017)  WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
The Zoox vehicle(1) was in conventional mode traveling southbound on 5th Street and making a protected left turn with green arrow onto 
Folsom Street. The other party's vehicle(2), while being pursued by members of the San Francisco Police Department, illegally entered the 
intersection from the opposite direction of travel on 5th Street at a high rate of speed and collided with the front/driver's side corner of the 
Zoox vehicle(1). The force of the impact deployed all front airbags of the Zoox vehicle(1). Both occupants of the Zoox vehicle(1) 
complained of minor injuries, but declined ambulance transportation.
Go to Page 3
